URL: https://github.com/AntennaPod/AntennaPod
Language: java
A podcast manager for Android

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NationalSecurityAgency/ghidra
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NationalSecurityAgency/ghidra
Language: java
Ghidra is a software reverse engineering (SRE) framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NotHarshhaa/DevOps-Projects
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NotHarshhaa/DevOps-Projects
Language: java
🚀 Real-world DevOps projects for aspiring engineers — Beginner to Advanced. Covers AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD, Terraform, Jenkins, and more. Hands-on learning with step-by-step guides.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Snailclimb/JavaGuide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Snailclimb/JavaGuide
Language: java
Java 面试 & 后端通用面试指南，覆盖计算机基础、数据库、分布式、高并发、系统设计与 AI 应用开发

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StarRocks/starrocks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StarRocks/starrocks
Language: java
The world's fastest open query engine for sub-second analytics both on and off the data lakehouse. With the flexibility to support nearly any scenario, StarRocks provides best-in-class performance for multi-dimensional analytics, real-time analytics, and ad-hoc queries. A Linux Foundation project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
Language: java
AgentScope Java: Agent-Oriented Programming for Building LLM Applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/kafka
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/kafka
Language: java
Apache Kafka - A distributed event streaming platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/polaris
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/polaris
Language: java
Apache Polaris, the interoperable, open source catalog for Apache Iceberg

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/pulsar
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/pulsar
Language: java
Apache Pulsar - distributed pub-sub messaging system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/tika
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/tika
Language: java
The Apache Tika toolkit detects and extracts metadata and text from over a thousand different file types (such as PPT, XLS, and PDF).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/tomcat
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/tomcat
Language: java
Apache Tomcat

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ashishps1/awesome-leetcode-resources
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ashishps1/awesome-leetcode-resources
Language: java
Awesome LeetCode resources to learn Data Structures and Algorithms and prepare for Coding Interviews.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: binarywang/WxJava
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/binarywang/WxJava
Language: java
微信开发 Java SDK ，支持包括微信支付，开放平台，小程序，企业微信，视频号，公众号等的后端开发

ns0:entry.ns0:title: exadel-inc/CompreFace
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/exadel-inc/CompreFace
Language: java
Leading free and open-source face recognition system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iflytek/skillhub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iflytek/skillhub
Language: java
Self-hosted, open-source agent skill registry for enterprises. Publish & version skill packages, govern with RBAC and audit logs, deploy on-premise with Docker or Kubernetes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jeecgboot/JeecgBoot
Language: java
AI 低代码平台，「低代码 + 零代码」双模式驱动：低代码一键生成前后端代码，零代码 5 分钟搭建系统，AI Skills 一句话画流程、设计表单、生成整套系统。内置 AI聊天、知识库、流程编排、MCP插件等，兼容主流大模型。引领「AI 生成 → 在线配置 → 代码生成 → 手工合并->AI修改」开发模式，消除 Java 项目 80% 的重复工作，提效而不失灵活。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jishenghua/jshERP
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jishenghua/jshERP
Language: java
管伊佳ERP（原名华夏ERP）基于SpringBoot框架和SaaS模式，立志为中小企业提供开源好用的ERP软件，目前专注进销存+财务功能。主要模块有零售管理、采购管理、销售管理、仓库管理、财务管理、报表查询、系统管理等。支持预付款、收入支出、仓库调拨、组装拆卸、订单等特色功能。拥有库存状况、出入库统计等报表。同时对角色和权限进行了细致全面控制，精确到每个按钮和菜单。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kousen/claude-code-training
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kousen/claude-code-training
Language: java
Slides and demos for a training course on Claude Code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: spring-projects/spring-framework
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework
Language: java
Spring Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trinodb/trino
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trinodb/trino
Language: java
Official repository of Trino, the distributed SQL query engine for big data, formerly known as PrestoSQL (https://trino.io)
